children.value: useNetStack - A Powerful Composable for API Requests

is a versatile Vue 3/Nuxt 3 composable that abstracts and enhances API requests with built-in features like retries, caching, timeouts, request cancellation, and logging. It is designed to handle common challenges in API requests while providing a flexible and configurable structure.
Automatically retry failed requests based on configurable settings.
: Set retries and retry delay per request
Set time limits on API requests to avoid indefinite waiting.
: Timeout can be set per request
Cache responses for a specified duration to minimize redundant network calls.
Define global defaults for retries, timeouts, caching, and more.
: Update default settings for all requests
Get real-time logging information about request behavior.
: Enable or disable logging in the global configuration
The core method to make API requests with enhanced features like retries, caching, timeouts, and logging.

props.code:
async function executeCall({
  apiRequest,

  retries = 3,

  retryDelay = 1000,

  timeout = 5000,

  cacheDuration = 60000,

  skipCache = false,

  cancellationToken,

  async = false,

  override = false,
}: ExecuteCallParams): Promise<any>;

children.value:

}: ExecuteCallParams): Promise<any>;
Modify global configurations for all requests.
object defines the structure of the API call, which includes the HTTP method, endpoint, headers, and body.

props.code:
interface ApiRequest {
  method: "GET" | "POST" | "PUT" | "DELETE" | "PATCH"; // HTTP method

  endpoint: string; // API endpoint

  headers?: Record<string, string>; // Optional headers

  queryParams?: Record<string, string | number>; // Optional query parameters

  body?: any; // Optional body for POST, PUT, etc.
}

children.value:
interface ApiRequest {
  method: "GET" | "POST" | "PUT" | "DELETE" | "PATCH"; // HTTP method

  endpoint: string; // API endpoint

  headers?: Record<string, string>; // Optional headers

  queryParams?: Record<string, string | number>; // Optional query parameters

  body?: any; // Optional body for POST, PUT, etc.
}
POST Request with Retries and Timeout

composable enhances the process of making API requests by providing support for retries, timeouts, caching, cancellation, and logging. It is flexible, with both per-request and global configurations available, making it a powerful tool for handling network requests in your Vue 3/Nuxt 3 applications.

props.code: This markdown file contains a detailed description of the package and covers all features introduced in `useNetStack`.
